brand.title: The HIMALAYA Story
brand.subtitle: Born from a passion for pure, premium refreshment
brand.description: Every drop of HIMALAYA SLUSHI is a testament to our relentless pursuit of perfection. We source only the finest ingredients, craft every blend with precision, and deliver an experience that transcends the ordinary.

pinaColada.name: Piña Colada Slushi
pinaColada.description: Tropical paradise in every sip. Creamy coconut meets sweet pineapple.

strawberry.name: Strawberry Bliss Slushi
strawberry.description: Intensely sweet, perfectly tart. Hand-picked strawberries.

rainbow.name: Rainbow Mix Slushi
rainbow.description: Seven flavors swirled into one spectacular icy masterpiece.
rainbow.ingredients: Strawberry, Mango, Lime, Blueberry, Peach, Watermelon, Coconut
